## table-plugin package

Function

Description

<tbody><tr><td>

[cssRulesFromSpecs(specs)](./table-plugin.cssrulesfromspecs.md)


</td><td>

Create css rules from a specification object.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[HTMLTable({ WebView, tableStyleSpecs, cssRules, html, sourceBaseUrl, animationType, computeHeuristicContentHeight, computeContainerHeight, webViewProps: userWebViewProps, style, onLinkPress, animationDuration, htmlAttribs, maxScale, ...stats }, input)](./table-plugin.htmltable.md)


</td><td>

A component capable of rendering a html string which root tag is a table tag. This component should not be used directly, except with custom renderers.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[useHtmlTableProps({ style, tnode }, input, tableConfig)](./table-plugin.usehtmltableprops.md)


</td><td>

Extract props for the HTMLTable component from renderer function arguments. This function is especially usefull for custom table renderers.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

</td><td>

This object defines how the table component can be customized.

<tr><td>

[TableHeuristicContentHeightState](./table-plugin.tableheuristiccontentheightstate.md)


</td><td>

This content height state is available on mount, before the real height is known from the DOM.


</td></tr>

[TableStyleSpecs](./table-plugin.tablestylespecs.md)

<tr><td>

[TableRenderer](./table-plugin.tablerenderer.md)


</td><td>

The renderer component for the table element. This renderer is fully scalable, and will adjust to `contentWidth` and `computeEmbeddedMaxWidth`<!-- -->. It also features `onLinkPress`<!-- -->.


</td></tr>
